message: feat: add accessibility paste target detection

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,157 @@
+import CoreGraphics
+import Foundation
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class AccessibilityPasteTargetTests: XCTestCase {
+    func testFocusedTextRoleIsAcceptedAsPasteTarget() {
+        let evaluator = AccessibilityPasteTargetEvaluator()
+        let element = TestAccessibilityElement(role: kAXTextFieldRole as String, isFocused: true)
+
+        let target = evaluator.findPasteTarget(startingAt: element, focusContext: true)
+
+        XCTAssertTrue(evaluator.isTextEntryRole(kAXTextFieldRole as String))
+        XCTAssertIdentical(target, element)
+    }
+
+    func testDisabledElementIsRejectedEvenWhenEditable() {
+        let evaluator = AccessibilityPasteTargetEvaluator()
+        let element = TestAccessibilityElement(
+            role: kAXTextFieldRole as String,
+            isEnabled: false,
+            isEditable: true,
+            isFocused: true
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertNil(evaluator.findPasteTarget(startingAt: element, focusContext: true))
+    }
+
+    func testUnfocusedElementRequiresSelectedRangeAndSettableValue() {
+        let evaluator = AccessibilityPasteTargetEvaluator()
+        let rejected = TestAccessibilityElement(
+            role: kAXTextAreaRole as String,
+            hasSelectedTextRange: true,
+            isValueSettable: false
+        )
+        let accepted = TestAccessibilityElement(
+            role: kAXTextAreaRole as String,
+            hasSelectedTextRange: true,
+            isValueSettable: true
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertNil(evaluator.findPasteTarget(startingAt: rejected, focusContext: false))
+        XCTAssertIdentical(
+            evaluator.findPasteTarget(startingAt: accepted, focusContext: false),
+            accepted
+        )
+    }
+
+    func testTreeWalkPrefersFocusedChildrenAndStopsAtDepthTwelve() {
+        let evaluator = AccessibilityPasteTargetEvaluator()
+        let deepRoot = TestAccessibilityElement(role: "AXGroup")
+        var cursor = deepRoot
+        for _ in 0..<12 {
+            let child = TestAccessibilityElement(role: "AXGroup")
+            cursor.children = [child]
+            cursor = child
+        }
+        cursor.children = [
+            TestAccessibilityElement(role: kAXTextFieldRole as String, isFocused: true),
+        ]
+
+        let matchingBranch = TestAccessibilityElement(role: "AXGroup")
+        let nonFocusedChild = TestAccessibilityElement(role: "AXGroup")
+        let focusedChild = TestAccessibilityElement(role: "AXGroup", isFocused: true)
+        let focusedTarget = TestAccessibilityElement(role: kAXComboBoxRole as String)
+        focusedChild.children = [focusedTarget]
+        matchingBranch.children = [nonFocusedChild, focusedChild]
+
+        XCTAssertNil(evaluator.findPasteTarget(startingAt: deepRoot, focusContext: false))
+        XCTAssertIdentical(
+            evaluator.findPasteTarget(startingAt: matchingBranch, focusContext: false),
+            focusedTarget
+        )
+    }
+
+    func testTextExtractionFallsBackToTextMarkersAndAncestors() {
+        let extractor = FocusedElementTextExtractor()
+        let parent = TestAccessibilityElement(
+            role: kAXTextAreaRole as String,
+            directText: nil,
+            textMarkerText: " parent text "
+        )
+        let child = TestAccessibilityElement(role: "AXGroup")
+        child.parentObject = parent
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(extractor.extractText(from: child), "parent text")
+    }
+}
+
+final class TestAccessibilityElement: AccessibilityElement {
+    var role: String?
+    var isEnabled: Bool?
+    var isEditable: Bool?
+    var isFocused: Bool
+    var hasSelectedTextRange: Bool
+    var isValueSettable: Bool
+    var children: [any AccessibilityElement] {
+        didSet {
+            relinkChildren()
+        }
+    }
+    weak var parentObject: TestAccessibilityElement?
+    var frame: CGRect?
+    var windowID: Int?
+    var directText: String?
+    var textMarkerText: String?
+
+    init(
+        role: String?,
+        isEnabled: Bool? = true,
+        isEditable: Bool? = nil,
+        isFocused: Bool = false,
+        hasSelectedTextRange: Bool = false,
+        isValueSettable: Bool = false,
+        children: [any AccessibilityElement] = [],
+        frame: CGRect? = nil,
+        windowID: Int? = nil,
+        directText: String? = nil,
+        textMarkerText: String? = nil
+    ) {
+        self.role = role
+        self.isEnabled = isEnabled
+        self.isEditable = isEditable
+        self.isFocused = isFocused
+        self.hasSelectedTextRange = hasSelectedTextRange
+        self.isValueSettable = isValueSettable
+        self.children = children
+        self.frame = frame
+        self.windowID = windowID
+        self.directText = directText
+        self.textMarkerText = textMarkerText
+        relinkChildren()
+    }
+
+    var parent: (any AccessibilityElement)? {
+        parentObject
+    }
+
+    func stringValue() -> String? {
+        directText
+    }
+
+    func markerText() -> String? {
+        textMarkerText
+    }
+
+    func setChildren(_ children: [TestAccessibilityElement]) {
+        self.children = children
+        relinkChildren()
+    }
+
+    private func relinkChildren() {
+        for child in children {
+            (child as? TestAccessibilityElement)?.parentObject = self
+        }
+    }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,205 @@
+import CoreGraphics
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class PasteTargetDetectorTests: XCTestCase {
+    func testDetectorReturnsFalseWhenAccessibilityPermissionIsMissing() {
+        let detector = makeDetector(
+            permission: false,
+            frontmostApplication: FrontmostApplicationContext(processID: 17, bundleIdentifier: "com.example.Editor"),
+            frontmostWindow: FrontmostWindowContext(windowID: 91, frame: .zero),
+            application: DetectorAccessibilityApplication()
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertFalse(detector.canPasteToFocusedElement())
+    }
+
+    func testDetectorAcceptsDirectFocusedTargetAndRecordsEditableObservation() {
+        let focused = TestAccessibilityElement(role: kAXTextFieldRole as String, isFocused: true, windowID: 91)
+        let application = DetectorAccessibilityApplication(directFocusedElement: focused)
+        let monitor = RecordingPasteTargetMonitor()
+        let detector = makeDetector(
+            frontmostApplication: FrontmostApplicationContext(processID: 17, bundleIdentifier: "com.example.Editor"),
+            frontmostWindow: FrontmostWindowContext(windowID: 91, frame: .zero),
+            application: application,
+            monitor: monitor
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertTrue(detector.canPasteToFocusedElement())
+        XCTAssertEqual(monitor.recordedObservations, [
+            PasteTargetObservation(processID: 17, windowID: 91, status: .editable),
+        ])
+    }
+
+    func testDetectorRejectsDirectNonTargetEvenWhenCachedObservationIsEditable() {
+        let focused = TestAccessibilityElement(role: "AXGroup", isFocused: true)
+        let application = DetectorAccessibilityApplication(directFocusedElement: focused)
+        let monitor = RecordingPasteTargetMonitor()
+        monitor.currentObservation = PasteTargetObservation(processID: 17, windowID: 91, status: .editable)
+        let detector = makeDetector(
+            frontmostApplication: FrontmostApplicationContext(processID: 17, bundleIdentifier: "com.example.Editor"),
+            frontmostWindow: FrontmostWindowContext(windowID: 91, frame: .zero),
+            application: application,
+            monitor: monitor
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertFalse(detector.canPasteToFocusedElement())
+    }
+
+    func testDetectorFallsBackToFocusedWindowSearchBeforeCachedObservation() {
+        let focusedDescendant = TestAccessibilityElement(role: kAXTextAreaRole as String, isFocused: true, windowID: 91)
+        let window = TestAccessibilityElement(role: "AXWindow", children: [focusedDescendant])
+        let application = DetectorAccessibilityApplication(focusedWindow: window)
+        let monitor = RecordingPasteTargetMonitor()
+        let detector = makeDetector(
+            frontmostApplication: FrontmostApplicationContext(processID: 17, bundleIdentifier: "com.example.Editor"),
+            frontmostWindow: FrontmostWindowContext(windowID: 91, frame: .zero),
+            application: application,
+            monitor: monitor
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertTrue(detector.canPasteToFocusedElement())
+        XCTAssertEqual(monitor.recordedObservations.last?.status, .editable)
+    }
+
+    func testDetectorUsesCachedEditableObservationOnlyWhenProcessAndWindowMatch() {
+        let monitor = RecordingPasteTargetMonitor()
+        monitor.currentObservation = PasteTargetObservation(processID: 17, windowID: 91, status: .editable)
+        let detector = makeDetector(
+            frontmostApplication: FrontmostApplicationContext(processID: 17, bundleIdentifier: "com.example.Editor"),
+            frontmostWindow: FrontmostWindowContext(windowID: 91, frame: .zero),
+            application: DetectorAccessibilityApplication(),
+            monitor: monitor
+        )
+        let mismatchMonitor = RecordingPasteTargetMonitor()
+        mismatchMonitor.currentObservation = PasteTargetObservation(processID: 17, windowID: 12, status: .editable)
+        let mismatchDetector = makeDetector(
+            frontmostApplication: FrontmostApplicationContext(processID: 17, bundleIdentifier: "com.example.Editor"),
+            frontmostWindow: FrontmostWindowContext(windowID: 91, frame: .zero),
+            application: DetectorAccessibilityApplication(),
+            monitor: mismatchMonitor
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertTrue(detector.canPasteToFocusedElement())
+        XCTAssertFalse(mismatchDetector.canPasteToFocusedElement())
+    }
+
+    func testDetectorStartsAndSynchronizesMonitorBeforeResolution() {
+        let focused = TestAccessibilityElement(role: kAXTextFieldRole as String, isFocused: true, windowID: 91)
+        let application = DetectorAccessibilityApplication(directFocusedElement: focused)
+        let monitor = RecordingPasteTargetMonitor()
+        let detector = makeDetector(
+            frontmostApplication: FrontmostApplicationContext(processID: 17, bundleIdentifier: "com.example.Editor"),
+            frontmostWindow: FrontmostWindowContext(windowID: 91, frame: .zero),
+            application: application,
+            monitor: monitor
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertTrue(detector.canPasteToFocusedElement())
+        XCTAssertEqual(monitor.events.prefix(2), [.start, .synchronize(17)])
+    }
+
+    private func makeDetector(
+        permission: Bool = true,
+        frontmostApplication: FrontmostApplicationContext?,
+        frontmostWindow: FrontmostWindowContext?,
+        application: DetectorAccessibilityApplication,
+        monitor: RecordingPasteTargetMonitor = RecordingPasteTargetMonitor()
+    ) -> AccessibilityPasteTargetDetector {
+        AccessibilityPasteTargetDetector(
+            accessibilityChecker: TestAccessibilityPermissionChecker(isTrusted: permission),
+            applicationProvider: TestFrontmostApplicationProvider(application: frontmostApplication),
+            windowResolver: TestFrontmostWindowResolver(window: frontmostWindow),
+            applicationFactory: TestAccessibilityApplicationFactory(application: application),
+            monitor: monitor
+        )
+    }
+}
+
+private struct TestAccessibilityPermissionChecker: AccessibilityPermissionChecking {
+    let isTrusted: Bool
+
+    func isTrusted(prompt: Bool) -> Bool {
+        _ = prompt
+        return isTrusted
+    }
+}
+
+private struct TestFrontmostApplicationProvider: FrontmostApplicationProviding {
+    let application: FrontmostApplicationContext?
+
+    func frontmostApplication() -> FrontmostApplicationContext? {
+        application
+    }
+}
+
+private struct TestFrontmostWindowResolver: FrontmostWindowResolving {
+    let window: FrontmostWindowContext?
+
+    func frontmostWindow(for processID: pid_t) -> FrontmostWindowContext? {
+        _ = processID
+        return window
+    }
+}
+
+private struct TestAccessibilityApplicationFactory: AccessibilityApplicationCreating {
+    let application: DetectorAccessibilityApplication
+
+    func application(processID: pid_t) -> any AccessibilityApplicationReading {
+        _ = processID
+        return application
+    }
+}
+
+private final class DetectorAccessibilityApplication: AccessibilityApplicationReading {
+    let directFocusedElement: (any AccessibilityElement)?
+    let focusedWindow: (any AccessibilityElement)?
+
+    init(
+        directFocusedElement: (any AccessibilityElement)? = nil,
+        focusedWindow: (any AccessibilityElement)? = nil
+    ) {
+        self.directFocusedElement = directFocusedElement
+        self.focusedWindow = focusedWindow
+    }
+
+    func focusedUIElement() -> (any AccessibilityElement)? {
+        directFocusedElement
+    }
+
+    func focusedWindowElement() -> (any AccessibilityElement)? {
+        focusedWindow
+    }
+}
+
+private final class RecordingPasteTargetMonitor: PasteTargetMonitoring {
+    enum Event: Equatable {
+        case start
+        case synchronize(pid_t?)
+        case record(PasteTargetObservation)
+        case clear
+    }
+
+    private(set) var events: [Event] = []
+    private(set) var recordedObservations: [PasteTargetObservation] = []
+    var currentObservation: PasteTargetObservation?
+
+    func start() {
+        events.append(.start)
+    }
+
+    func synchronize(to application: FrontmostApplicationContext?) {
+        events.append(.synchronize(application?.processID))
+    }
+
+    func record(_ observation: PasteTargetObservation) {
+        recordedObservations.append(observation)
+        currentObservation = observation
+        events.append(.record(observation))
+    }
+
+    func clearObservation() {
+        currentObservation = nil
+        events.append(.clear)
+    }
+}
